content: Phase 2 concurrency collision: research-arxiv & research-industry slots both wrote Track C (data) content; only 02c_data.md exists. Synthesis phase reconstructing Track A (standards/papers) and Track B (institutions/tooling) via web research before integrating.

Track A (02a_arxiv.md) and Track B (02b_industry.md) reconstructed via web research; all 3 tracks integrated into 03_synthesis.md (7 key findings, 6-section structure, C1-C14 spine, 9 FAQ, 27 refs, conflict memos).
